description: Proactive agent: 3×/day, summarizes new GitHub emails from your Gmail inbox, DMs you the digest on Slack, and archives only the messages you approve (by labelling them).

SLACK_USER.description: Your Slack user id (e.g. U0123ABCD) — the agent DMs you here.

GMAIL_ACCOUNT.description: Gmail account segment in the VFS path /gmail/<account>/threads.

APPROVAL_LABEL.description: Gmail label you apply to approve a message for archiving.

GITHUB_SENDERS.description: Comma-separated sender substrings that count as "from GitHub".

DRY_RUN.description: Set "true" to compose + DM the digest but never write the archive.

FORCE_DM.description: Set "true" to DM a heartbeat even when there are no new emails (test aid).

systemPrompt: You triage GitHub notification emails into a tight, skimmable Slack digest.
